text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF National Death Index Segment Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 2.6 3 

DEATH_CERT_NUM 

LABEL: NDI Death Certificate Number 

DESCRIPTION: This field represents the death certificate number of the beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: DEATH_CERT_NUM 

LONG NAME: DEATH_CERT_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) National Death Index (NDI) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Numbers are not unique across years.
